title: Russia exploiting Iran war, Zelensky says after fresh bombardment
summary_full: Volodymyr Zelensky cast concern over the supply of air-defence missiles after a heavy overnight attack kills at least five.
summary_public: Volodymyr Zelensky cast concern over the supply of air-defence missiles after a heavy overnight attack kills at least five.
